cit.basis: Impuesto sobre la Renta (Código Fiscal, art. 699): flat 25% on net taxable income.

cair.note: CAIR (Cálculo Alterno del Impuesto sobre la Renta): companies with taxable gross income above USD 1.5m pay the greater of 25% of net taxable income or 4.67% of gross taxable income (25% of a deemed 18.67% presumptive base). Relief via non-application request possible in loss/high-effective-rate cases.

cit.note: Administered by the Dirección General de Ingresos (DGI), Ministerio de Economía y Finanzas.

vat.note: ITBMS (Impuesto a la Transferencia de Bienes Corporales Muebles y la Prestación de Servicios) 7% standard rate; 10% on alcohol and hotel accommodation, 15% on tobacco.

territorial_system.note: Panama applies a territorial system: only Panama-source income is subject to income tax; foreign-source income is out of scope.

free_zones.note: Free-zone regimes (e.g. Zona Libre de Colón, Panamá Pacífico, SEM/EMMA) offer preferential or reduced income-tax treatment for qualifying activities — out of scope for this SME estimator.

official_sources.name: Dirección General de Ingresos (DGI), Ministerio de Economía y Finanzas de Panamá

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
CAIR non-application relief, free-zone regimes, dividend/complementary tax, and sector rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
